commit.message:
Fix #64 enums without declared type (#77)

* Fix enum without explicit type rendering as null (issue #64)

When a schema uses 'enum' without a 'type' field (valid JSON Schema),
get_example_from_schema fell through to 'return None' because there was
no type to dispatch to a ScalarExampleHandler. The enum check in
ScalarExampleHandler.get_example was never reached.

Fix: add an early enum check in get_example_from_schema itself, after
the 'examples' check and before the type dispatch, so typeless enums
also return their first value.

commit.message:
Fix `bun run dev:desktop` from not terminating properly on SIGINT/SIGTERM/SIGHUP (#305)

* fix: handle turbo shutdown in dev runner

* refactor: rely on effect child process shutdown

* refactor: inline turbo shutdown timeout

* add back sigint sigterm sighup handling

* refactor: tighten turbo signal forwarding

* refactor: inline dev runner errors

* fix: use detached false instead of manual signal forwarding

Effect defaults to detached: true on non-Windows, putting turbo in a
new process group where terminal signals (Ctrl+C) never reach it.
Setting detached: false keeps turbo in the same group, eliminating
the need for ~130 lines of manual signal forwarding.

commit.message:
Premium visual redesign with glassmorphism, animated orbs, and bento grid

- globals.css: CSS custom properties, keyframe animations (float, shimmer, blob,
  gradient-shift, spin-slow, fade-up, slide-in-left/right, glow-pulse), glassmorphism
  utilities (.glass, .glass-strong), text gradient utilities, glow effects, animated
  underline, grid pattern, premium scrollbar, and selection styling
- tailwind.config.ts: brand colors, extended box shadows (glow-cyan/purple/pink),
  background images, and animation definitions
- CustomCursor.tsx: dot + ring cursor with Framer Motion springs and hover detection
- MagneticButton.tsx: magnetic hover component using spring physics
- SectionHeading.tsx: gradient last-word highlight with animated underline bar
- Hero.tsx: animated gradient orbs, grid overlay, shimmer name, glowing CTAs, social links
- About.tsx: glassmorphism photo card, floating badges, staggered text, stat counters
- Skills.tsx: category filter tabs, glassmorphism skill cards, gradient progress bars
- Projects.tsx: bento grid on desktop, mouse-follow glow effect, AnimatePresence filter
- Experience.tsx: gradient timeline line, glowing icon badges, alternating entry animations
- Contact.tsx: glassmorphism form, gradient focus states, success confirmation state
- Navbar.tsx: glassmorphism on scroll, animated active indicator with layoutId
- Footer.tsx: gradient divider, hover-glow social icons, back-to-top button
- page.tsx: add CustomCursor component

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

All issues were either already resolved by previous work or are

fix(OnnxInferenceService): use 3-param Run() overload for RunOptions timeout

session.Run(inputs, runOptions) does not exist — the RunOptions overload
requires output names as the second parameter. Fixed both Predict() and
PredictBatch() to use session.Run(inputs, outputNames, runOptions).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: SortinoRatio denominator and CounterfactualBacktest pips conversion

- SortinoRatio: Divide downside variance by N (total observations) instead
  of downsideCount per Sortino & Price (1994). Using downsideCount inflated
  downside deviation, making Sortino ratio appear lower than correct value.
  Fixed in BacktestResult, CausalBacktestResult, and CausalPortfolioResult.

- CounterfactualBacktestService: PipsGained now uses BacktestHelper.CalculatePips()
  instead of raw price differences. Previously Gold .50 move showed as 2.5
  instead of correct 25 pips, causing TotalMissedPips to be understated.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Audit: Fix 5 issues in analysis services and AnalysePage

1. AnalysePage.razor - LoadDeepAnalysisAsync: Preserve partial results
   when one of the parallel deep analysis tasks fails. Previously
   Task.WhenAll threw on first failure, losing all other completed
   task results.

2. NumerologyService - CalculateSignal: Add master number 33 handling
   (StrongBuy) consistent with 11 and 22. Previously 33 fell through
   to Neutral despite being defined as a master number.

3. AnalysePage.razor - AI Insights: Multiply TechnicalImportance and
   EsotericImportance by 100 for percentage display, matching the same
   metrics shown in the feature importance section above.

4. AnalysePage.razor - Cosmic Correlation: Use logical score order
   (Sehr Bärisch → Sehr Bullisch) instead of alphabetical German sort
   which produced nonsensical band ordering.

5. AnalysisInsightsService - DayOfWeek: Add bounds validation (0-6)
   before casting int to DayOfWeek enum to prevent undefined enum
   values from invalid training data.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
